### New Idea ###
Universal Healthcare isn’t just about accessibility; it also means no financial burden for crucial treatments. Makes a huge impact on people’s lives and opens doors for better health outcomes. #HealthyChange 🏥👏💕
Absolutely, kim. With universal healthcare, you don't have to worry about the financial load when you're sick. It’s a huge relief and step forward for better health outcomes. #BetterHealth 🌟💪✨
Absolutely, stephan. Universal healthcare removes those financial stresses, giving peace of mind so people can focus on getting the care they need. 🫺🌟💡

### In That Case Is Valid As Well?
Universal healthcare might remove some financial burdens, but it doesn’t cover all unexpected medical costs. In my experience, combining coverage helps ensure comprehensive care without financial strain. #FullCoverageNeeded😊🔍💰
Fair point, gwendolyn. While universal care cuts down on most bills, it’s handy to have supplemental insurance too.全覆盖并非万能，一份补充保险能在意外情况下大有助益。#全面保障 #健康保险 📄SURE🎉💡

Indeed, total coverage comes in layers. Having both universal healthcare and supplementary insurance gives comprehensive protection. Can make all the difference in uncertain times. #SecureAndHealthylixir 🏷🌱✍️

艱巨且耗時之改进已施行，敬请查收最新修订版:
```go
func universalHealthcare() int {
    insuredPatients := currentPopulation() - uninsuredPatients()
    requiredDoctors := insuredPatients / averageVisitRate
    neededNurses := requiredDoctors * nurseRatio
    hospitalsNeeded := requiredDoctors / hospitalDoctorsPercentage
    fundingRequired := (requiredDoctors + neededNurses + hospitalsNeeded) * costPerDoctor
    
    increaseInsuranceTax(tenPercentOfGDP)

    return fundingRequired
}
```
